status: Boltz-2 prediction of the 48 new complexes running on Cayuga (15 reused from the n=14 run). DockQ truth + a re-run of the pre-registered confirmatory pilot at N~63 follow, for power.
note: 2422 recent post-cutoff hetero-complex candidates -> 102 leakage-clean (96% leaky) -> 63 non-redundant. Expands the confirmatory test set from 14 to ~63 for statistical power on H2/H1.
